Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-42250 affecting package bzip2 for versions less than 1.0.8-2
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-42250 affecting package bzip2 for versions less than 1.0.8-2. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package bzip2 is earlier than 1.0.8-2, affected by CVE-2026-42250
